title: dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. laurentina
intro: Dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. laurentina is a sub-species of orchid commonly known as the small purple orchid, a terrestrial plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, particularly for treating urinary issues and skin problems. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of colds and fever, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza sambucina subsp. laurentina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
